common.empty: Echoes in the dark. Visit your first show and you can re-visit it here later

intro.title: Find gigs, discover talent, and book better nights
intro.description: Headline connects artists, venues, and visitors in one place so every show is easier to discover and easier to make happen.

artists.title: For artists
artists.description: Show who you are, get discovered by venues, and stay visible when new booking opportunities open up.

venues.title: For venues
venues.description: Browse artists to book, compare local acts, and keep your calendar filled with the right live experiences.

visitors.title: For visitors
visitors.description: Find upcoming shows nearby, explore new favorites, and decide which nights out are worth your time.

empty.title: There are no shows to display yet
empty.tooltip: Try using the filters at the top
empty.description: Explore is wired up, but there are no published shows, artists, or venues in the database yet.
empty.artistDescription: Once artists create profiles and publish upcoming gigs, they will appear here.
empty.venueDescription: As venues publish their programs and open booking nights, the lists will start to fill up.
empty.visitorDescription: As soon as the first gigs are live, this is where people will discover what to go to next.

featured.title: Featured nights
featured.description: A tighter selection of the strongest nearby gigs right now.

shows.title: Shows worth going to
shows.description: A faster-scanning list of nights you can jump into right away.

venues.title: Venues to keep an eye on
venues.description: Rooms, stages, and clubs already shaping strong upcoming nights.

bands.title: Bands to discover
bands.description: Local acts and new favorites to book, follow, or go see live.

matchmaking.bandDescription: As a band, you get a quicker view of which rooms and nights look like a strong fit right now.
matchmaking.venueDescription: As a venue, you can quickly discover acts that look ready for more bookings and fit your upcoming nights.
matchmaking.bandFallback: This venue has opened up new booking slots and is looking for the right live energy for upcoming nights.
matchmaking.venueFallback: This band is visible for new bookings and looking for rooms that fit their live sound.
matchmaking.noVenueMatchesTitle: No open venue opportunities right now
matchmaking.noVenueMatchesDescription: As more venues mark themselves as actively looking for bands, they will appear here so artists can quickly find the right rooms to contact.
matchmaking.noBandMatchesTitle: No bands are actively looking for gigs right now
matchmaking.noBandMatchesDescription: As more artists mark themselves as open for bookings, this section will fill up automatically.

inquiry.defaultBandMessage: Hi {{targetName}}! We are interested in playing with you and would love to hear more about your upcoming booking opportunities.
inquiry.validationDescription: Name, email, and a message are required to send the inquiry.
inquiry.messagePlaceholder: Write a few lines about what you are looking for
inquiry.successDescription: Your inquiry to {{targetName}} has been sent.
inquiry.bandDescription: Send a short pitch and your contact details so the venue can get back to you if you fit their open slots.
inquiry.defaultVenueMessage: Hi {{targetName}}! We run a venue and would love to talk about booking you for an upcoming night.
inquiry.errorDescription: Please try again in a moment.
inquiry.venueDescription: Share a few lines about your night and what you want to book, and the inquiry will be sent to the band.

newUser.title: Hello there!
newUser.subTitle: Consider signing up for the best experience

content.title: Just a few of the things we have to offer:
content.favourites: Add favourites get news from your favourites venues and bands!
content.notifications: Get notified when your favourite band or venue has news to tell

show.noTickets: Tickets have not been released for this show yet.

management.title: Show management
management.description: Publish the show when it is ready for discovery and add ticket types for the public release.
management.publishSuccess: The show is now visible in Explore and ready for ticket sales.
management.unpublishSuccess: The show has been moved back to draft.
management.error: Please try again in a moment.
management.slotDescription: Create a concrete slot proposal for {{bandName}} in this show.
management.slotSuccess: {{bandName}} has been added to the show lineup.
management.ticketSuccess: The ticket type has been added to the show.
management.ticketValidation: Add a ticket name, price, and amount before creating the ticket.

profile.authenticatedDescription: You are signed in and ready to build your presence in Headline.

favourites.title: Favourites
favourites.placeholder:
You currently don't have any favourite venues or bands.

Add a new favourite by pressing the heart icon at the top right on the venue or and card.

accountStatus.title: Your account right now
accountStatus.description: Once you create an artist or venue profile, the account becomes bookable and gains its real role in the app.

nextStep.title: Next step
nextStep.description: You are in. As we build out onboarding, you will be able to create your artist or venue profile and then publish that you are looking for gigs or acts.

builders.title: Build your profiles
builders.description: The same account can be both an artist and a venue. Create one, the other, or multiple of each if that matches how you work.

matchmaking.bandSectionDescription: Control which of your bands should appear as actively open for new gigs and add a short booking note.
matchmaking.venueSectionDescription: Control which of your venues are actively looking for new acts and describe what you want to book.
matchmaking.bandCardDescription: When this is on, venues can discover the band in the matchmaking section of Explore.
matchmaking.venueCardDescription: When this is on, bands can discover the venue profile in the matchmaking section of Explore.
matchmaking.bandToggleOn: This band is looking for gigs
matchmaking.bandToggleOff: This band is not looking for gigs
matchmaking.venueToggleOn: This venue is looking for bands
matchmaking.venueToggleOff: This venue is not looking for bands
matchmaking.bandNotesPlaceholder: Share which dates, cities, or kinds of nights you are aiming for.
matchmaking.venueNotesPlaceholder: Share what kind of act, setup, or upcoming night you want to book.
matchmaking.bandSaved: The band's booking status has been updated.
matchmaking.venueSaved: The venue booking status has been updated.
matchmaking.errorDescription: Please try again in a moment.

inbox.title: Booking inbox
inbox.description: Follow incoming and outgoing inquiries in one place.

hero.title: Keep every booking inquiry that needs attention in one place
hero.description: See incoming and outgoing booking requests, then reply, mark as read, or archive them without leaving the app.

reply.label: Reply to this inquiry
reply.placeholder: Write a short answer, next step, or booking note.
reply.bookingConfirmed: {{senderName}} works for us. Let's lock this booking.

empty.title: The inbox is quiet for now
empty.description: When you send or receive real booking inquiries, they will collect here.

seed.incomingBandMessage: {{senderName}} has an open night and wants to book {{targetName}}.
seed.outgoingVenueMessage: You sent an inquiry to {{targetName}} from {{senderName}}.
seed.outgoingVenueReply: {{senderName}} likes the idea and wants to continue the conversation.
seed.acceptedReply: {{senderName}} wants to move forward and lock a slot.
seed.archivedBandMessage: {{senderName}} reached out to {{targetName}}, but the thread has already been archived.

hero.title: Your nights, gathered in one place
hero.description: This is where your tickets, entry passes, and upcoming nights live so you can get to the right show quickly.
hero.signedOut: Sign in to view your tickets, or preview how the ticket wallet will look.

tickets.pastDescription: Shows you have already attended or used the ticket for.
tickets.emptyDescription: Once purchase and scanning are fully wired into the app, your tickets will appear here.
tickets.emptySignedOutTitle: Sign in to view your tickets
tickets.emptySignedOutDescription: The ticket flow is tied to your account, so you need to be signed in to view upcoming or past nights.

details.title: Ticket details
details.scanHint: Show this code at the door
details.missingDescription: Go back to the ticket screen and open a ticket to view its details.

checkout.title: Complete your ticket purchase
checkout.description: This is a mock payment flow for now. Once you confirm, the ticket is created on your account and added to your wallet.
checkout.mockPaymentDescription: Mock card ending in 4242. No real payment is processed in this flow.
checkout.emptyDescription: Go back to the show and choose a ticket type before opening checkout.
checkout.errorDescription: The mock payment could not be completed right now. Please try again in a moment.

completed.title: Your ticket is ready
completed.description: The ticket has been added to your wallet and can be shown at the door when it is time.

hero.eyebrow: Claim your place in live music
hero.title: Sign in to book, get booked, and shape the next night
hero.description: We are keeping Firebase for identity so we can ship a stable auth layer quickly and build the real artist and venue flows on top of it.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.description: Sign in with your email to restore your account, your context, and your upcoming booking flows.
signIn.footer: Once signed in, we can connect this account to your artist and venue profiles in the next step.

signUp.title: Create an account with room to grow
signUp.description: Start with your contact details and choose the path that best matches you right now.
signUp.footer: This selection guides onboarding. Your actual artist or venue role becomes active once you create that profile.

roles.heading: Which path should we start you on?

visitor.title: Visitor
visitor.description: I want to discover gigs, follow venues, and see what is on.

band.title: Band or artist
band.description: I want to be discovered by venues and mark that I am looking for gigs.

venue.title: Venue
venue.description: I want to find artists to book and show when I am looking for new acts.

validation.title: Fill in the key details first
validation.signIn: Email and password are required to sign in.
validation.signUp: First name, last name, email, phone number, and password are required to create the account.

common.name: Name
common.locationNote: We connect the profile to your current location when available, otherwise we use a safe default position until you fine-tune it later.

band.title: Create artist profile
band.description: This is the foundation for showing that you are bookable and later marking that you are looking for gigs.
band.descriptionPlaceholder: Share a short take on your sound, live energy, and what makes the act bookable.

venue.title: Create venue profile
venue.description: This is the foundation for showing your room, club, or stage and later marking that you are looking for acts.
venue.descriptionPlaceholder: Share a short take on the room, the crowd, and the kinds of nights you book.

validation.title: A few details are missing
validation.authRequired: You need to be signed in before you can create a profile.
validation.requiredFields: Name, street address, city, zip code, and country are required to create the profile.
validation.bandPrice: Please add a target fee for the artist profile.
validation.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

success.title: Profile created
success.band: The artist profile is now created and linked to your account.
success.venue: The venue profile is now created and linked to your account.

hero.title: Build shows, slots and festival days
hero.description: Plan a standard show with open slots or build a city festival across several days and venues in the same flow.

festival.title: Festival frame
festival.description: Set a shared title and tone for the festival, then build each day or venue below.

fields.name: Show name
fields.slotsDescription: Create open or booked times for the night. A slot without a band becomes an open place to fill later.

placeholders.festivalDescription: A city-wide festival with several stages, days and sounds.
placeholders.showDescription: Describe the night, the theme or the audience you want to reach.

matching.title: Accepted inquiry ready for planning
matching.description: You accepted {{bandName}}. Start with a new show draft below, or attach the band to one of your planned shows.

planned.title: Planned shows
planned.description: This is what is already planned per venue and how many open slots are still available.
planned.emptyVenue: There are no planned shows for this venue yet.

validation.title: Some details are missing
validation.noVenue: You need at least one venue on the account to plan shows.
validation.festivalName: A festival setup needs a festival name.
validation.requiredFields: Venue, date and at least one slot are required for each show.
validation.slotFields: Each slot needs a start time and duration in minutes.

success.title: Planner saved
success.single: The show is created and added to your venue planning.
success.festival: The festival days are created and added to your venue planning.

errors.title: Could not save
errors.create: Something went wrong while creating the show. Please try again in a moment.
errors.loadPlans: We could not load your planned shows right now.

empty.title: Create a venue profile first
empty.description: Once you have at least one venue on the account you can plan standard shows, open slots and festival setups here.
